documentation.description:
Allocate a new memory region of length Length

Storage_Error is raised whenever Length > ISize'Last - 1 or if the
allocation fails (not enough memory, rlimit, ...).

subprograms.name: Clone
subprograms.code: function Clone (Addr : Address; Length : SizeType) return Address

documentation.description:
Clone a memory region of length Length starting at Address Addr.

Storage_Error is raised in the allocation of the new region fails (See
Allocate errors).

subprograms.name: Copy
Get
subprograms.code: function Get (Self : Address; Offset : SizeType) return Byte

subprograms.name: Get_UTF8
subprograms.code: function Get_UTF8 (Self : in out Address) return UInt32

subprograms.name: Is_Equal

documentation.description: Compare two memory regions and return True if they are equal

subprograms.name: Offset
subprograms.code: function Offset (Self : Address; Origin: Address) return IndexType

documentation.description: Return offset between Self and Origin (i.e Self - Origin)

subprograms.name: Reallocate
subprograms.code: procedure Reallocate (Addr : in out Address; Length : SizeType)

documentation.description:
Reallocate a memory region to a new size. The new size can lower or
higher then the previous size.

Storage_Error is raised in the allocation of the new region fails (See
Allocate errors).

subprograms.name: Reallocate_And_Copy

documentation.description:
Copy Src of size Src_Length into Dst + Dst_Offset. Dst_Length is the
length of the memory region starting at Dst. Note that resizing will
allocate extra space.

If Src does not fit into Dst, then Dst is reallocated to make room for
Src.

Storage_Error is raised if the reallocation of Dst fails (See
Allocate errors).
Create a reference to an Ada String memory address

subprograms.name: Set
subprograms.code: procedure Set (Self : Address; Offset : SizeType; b : Byte)

subprograms.name: Starts_With

documentation.description: Check if buffer Self starts with Prefix

subprograms.name: Validate_UTF8
subprograms.code: function Validate_UTF8 (Self : Address; Length : SizeType) return Boolean
